examples: Without bothering to dry off, I pulled on my bathrobe.
Hundreds of thousands of people sabotaged a question about religion by claiming that they were Jedi, the bathrobe-wearing superheroes of the Star Wars films.
The man wore a bathrobe and had evidently just come from the bathroom.
When he looks in she's asleep, still in her bathrobe, wrapped in an afghan.
Wearing the thick bathrobe provided by an attendant, I walk from the shower to the wash basin.
